## git
- Used for cloning repos and version control

## openssh
- Needed for SSH-based Git operations

## yazi
- Installs both `yazi` and `ya`

## nnn
- Release asset name does not match the expected command name, linked to ~/.local/bin/nnn

## zoxide
- Smarter cd command; use `z` to jump to frequented directories

## pyenv
- Python version manager installed into `~/.pyenv`
